examples: "Regardless of discipline, employers are looking for individuals with the ability to multitask," says Fay.
Women seem to be able to multitask better than men.
Imagine you are pouring your heat out to someone and they are just busy on their phone, and if you ask for their attention you get the response—I can multitask.
Preloaded with Google apps and built to multitask, Android feature-rich devices create a superior mobile experience.
To prevent a disastrous drain on battery life, Apple has allowed only certain apps to fully multitask.
